answers: Balanced diet: 40% carbs, 30% protein, 30% healthy fats. Fill half your plate with vegetables at each meal.
Weight loss diet: reduce carbs slightly, increase protein (keeps you full), eat more fiber, and avoid liquid calories.
Healthy eating: whole grains, lean protein, lots of veggies and fruits, healthy fats (nuts, olive oil), and adequate water.
Khabar talika: shokal e protein (dim/oats), dupure bhat-mach-shobji, bikale fruits/nuts, rate halka khabar khao.

feelings.question: how to cook healthy food for weight loss
feelings.answer:
Weight loss diet: reduce carbs slightly, increase protein (keeps you full), eat more fiber, and avoid liquid calories.

Regarding fitness: Fitness basics: 30 minutes of movement daily, eat in a slight calorie deficit for weight loss, and get enough sleep for recovery.

About weight loss: Weight loss = calories in < calories out.
